boss.name: The Alchemical Abomination
boss.victory_condition: Purify the corrupted core

encounters.trigger: Stepping on broken glass initiates combat and reveals the path to the Apothecary
Opening the sealed cabinet releases the guardian and unlocks the Sanctum door
Removing the seal from the altar awakens the golem and unlocks the Boss Arena

output.objective: Escape the haunted manor by purifying the corrupted core

boss.name: The Ashen Monarch
boss.victory_condition: Extinguish the Monarch's soul using the Eternal Frost Ember.

encounters.trigger: Stepping on the cracked tile reveals the path to the Altar of Woe.

pickup.effect: Allows the player to generate a wave of absolute zero
pickup.name: Eternal Frost Ember

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel opens the locked gates to the Monarch's Sanctum.
Killing the Specter triggers the final chamber door to swing wide open.

output.objective: Survive the gauntlet and execute the Ashen Monarch to reclaim your stolen flame.
output.reward: The Crown of Embers and Eternal Pyro-Mastery
output.setting: A decaying, subterranean labyrinth beneath a ruined cathedral.

normalized.setting: A decaying, subterranean labyrinth beneath a ruined cathedral.

boss.name: The Fractured Archivist

encounters.trigger: Opening the first ancient tome triggers a collapse that reveals the next chamber
Slaying the scribe causes the floor to rot away, dropping the player into the Sanctum
Defeating the Void Knight forces open the heavy iron doors to the boss arena

boss.name: Baron Cogsworth the Clockwork Balloonist
boss.victory_condition: Deflate his mechanical dirigible using the Liquid Nitrogen Flask.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the goblin causes a steam valve to burst, revealing a hidden path to the Brass Foundry.
Once the drake short-circuits, it crashes into the main lever for the Airship Hangar elevator.
The guard's collapse dislodges the docking clamp, allowing the Baron's dirigible to descend.

output.objective: Retrieve the stolen Aether-Core from the Baron's dirigible.

boss.name: Steam-Automaton Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Disable the central pressure valve after coolant application

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the steam vent reveals the path to the laboratory
Accessing the cargo terminal unlocks the ventilation shaft leading to the reactor core
Opening the main containment door initiates the override sequence against the Overlord

output.objective: Infiltrate the brass fortress and sabotage the primary steam reactor before it detonates
output.reward: The master key to the Cogwork Vault
output.setting: A decaying, soot-stained industrial cityscape powered by unstable steam tech
